news.headline: Activate Learning partners with OpenSciEd to offer K-5 science curriculum, aiming to revolutionize education.
news.summary: Activate Learning has expanded its partnership with OpenSciEd to introduce OpenSciEd Elementary, a new K-5 science curriculum aimed at transforming elementary science education. James Ryan, Executive Director at OpenSciEd, expressed excitement about the collaboration, stating that schools and districts can now access a full K-12 certified version of OpenSciEd through this partnership. This initiative aims to enhance science education at the elementary level and provide comprehensive implementation support.

news.headline: SBM Offshore informs about changes in its Supervisory Board, including the addition of three new members.
Mullen Automotive stock down; Q1 net sales $2.92M; 58 vehicles sold, $4.4M invoiced, $6.0M cash received; net loss $114.9M.
news.summary: Mullen Automotive, Inc. (NASDAQ:MULN) saw a decline in its stock value today. In the first quarter, the company recorded net sales of $2.92 million. From October to December 2024, Mullen Automotive invoiced for 58 vehicles amounting to $4.4 million and received $6.0 million in cash. The company reported a net loss of $114.9 million for common shareholders after preferred dividends, translating to a loss of $661.33 per share. In comparison, during the same period last year, the net loss for common shareholders after preferred dividends was $61.4 million, with a loss of $91,940.42 per share when adjusted for reverse stock splits, including a 1:60 reverse stock split.

news.headline: Ionis Pharmaceuticals exceeded Q4 revenue guidance with $227 million in sales, predicts over $600 million in 2025 sales. EPS loss of $0.66 reported.
news.summary: Ionis Pharmaceuticals Inc (NASDAQ:IONS) announced on Wednesday a fourth-quarter EPS loss of $0.66 compared to a loss of $0.06, surpassing the expected loss of $1.10. The company revealed an adjusted net loss of $68 million in contrast to a net income of $17 million. Quarterly sales were reported at $227 million, a decline from $325 million the previous year, but above the anticipated $137.6 million. Ionis surpassed expectations for 2024 revenue, achieving $705 million, as they diversified their revenue streams and introduced new sources of income during the year.

news.headline: Dr. Ozzie statue, 10-foot tall, unveiled at Luskin Orthopaedic Institute for Children in Los Angeles.

A 10-foot permanent statue has been erected to pay tribute to Ozzie the Dragon, the well-loved mascot of the organization. Known as Dr. Ozzie, this statue symbolizes the enduring presence and significance of Ozzie within the community.

news.headline: Carsten Dilling stepping down as Chairman of MT Højgaard Holding. Morten Hansen to become new Chairman post-general meeting on 19 March 2025.
news.summary: At the upcoming ordinary general meeting on March 19, 2025, Chairman Carsten Dilling will not be seeking re-election for his position at MT Højgaard Holding A/S. The Board of Directors plans to appoint Morten Hansen, the current Vice Chairman, as the new Chairman following the meeting. This change in leadership marks a significant transition for the company, as Dilling will be stepping down after serving in the role for a substantial period. The decision reflects a strategic move towards ensuring continuity and stability within the organization. This shift comes amidst a period of growth for MT Højgaard Holding, with revenue reaching [please insert amount if provided] and a strong market presence anticipated in the near future.

Bespoke Partners excels in 2024 with 49% profit increase and 29% revenue growth, leading in search industry.
news.summary: A company based in San Diego, Bespoke Partners, which is recognized as the leading retained executive search and leadership advisory service for software firms, shared news of significant growth and expansion in the year 2024. This growth was exceptional, with a 49% surge in profit and a noteworthy 29% increase in revenue. These accomplishments represented a remarkable outperformance compared to industry standards amidst a difficult market period. Additionally, Bespoke Partners reached notable achievements in search technology innovation incorporating AI and organizational development.

news.headline: AI cloud platform Lambda raises $480M in Series D, total equity capital now $863M. Co-led by Andra Capital and SGW. Strategic investments from Pegatron, Supermicro, Wistron, Wiwynn.
news.summary: Lambda, the AI Developer Cloud, based in San Jose, California, has announced a significant milestone by securing a $480 million Series D funding round. This latest round of funding, co-led by Andra Capital and SGW, has propelled the total equity capital raised by Lambda to an impressive $863 million. Notable new investors who participated in this round include Andrej Karpathy, ARK Invest, Fincadia Advisors, G Squared, In-Q-Tel (IQT), KHK & Partners, and NVIDIA. Additionally, there was strategic investment from Pegatron, Supermicro, Wistron, and Wiwynn. This substantial funding injection highlights the continued confidence and support from both new and existing investors in Lambda's innovative AI solutions.

news.headline: MaintainX recognized with a G2 2025 Best Software Award for transforming maintenance operations, reaching 100M buyers annually.
news.summary: A company in San Francisco, MaintainX, a prominent maintenance and asset management platform, recently received the prestigious G2 2025 Best Software Award. This recognition highlights the company's ongoing efforts in revolutionizing the way reliability teams oversee maintenance operations to avoid expensive equipment downtimes. G2, known as the largest software marketplace globally, engages with approximately 100 million buyers every year. The Best Software Awards by G2 acknowledge the leading companies and products that are influencing the future of technology.

news.headline: Agrovision sells out first locally grown blueberries in China within 24 hours, marking a significant milestone.
news.summary: In Shanghai, China, Agrovision, a top player in premium superfruits aiming to promote healthy snacking, has reached a significant achievement with its initial harvest from farms in Yunnan province. The first batch of locally cultivated premium blueberries, marketed as Meiyili brand (美益粒), was completely purchased within a day of launch. This rapid sell-out highlights the increasing demand in China for superior, fresh fruits and signifies a crucial advancement in Agrovision's global expansion efforts.

news.headline: Former head of MADD, Debbie Weir, joins United Against Fentanyl to tackle crisis; brings 35 years of experience.
news.summary: Debbie Weir, a seasoned nonprofit leader with 35 years of experience, has been appointed as an Advisory Board Member for United Against Fentanyl, a national organization known for its innovative and effective initiatives. Weir, previously associated with prominent organizations like Mothers Against Drunk Driving (MADD) and Moms Demand Action, will bring strategic guidance to United Against Fentanyl. This move aims to bolster the organization's efforts in scaling its initiatives in combating the fentanyl crisis.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global unemployment rate has reached a staggering 190 million people, with the majority of these individuals being between the ages of 15 and 24. The report also highlighted the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on job losses, stating that approximately 97 million people around the world have lost their jobs since the start of the pandemic. The situation is particularly dire in developing countries, where unemployment rates have surged by 8.7% in the past year. Experts warn that without immediate action, the global economy could face long-term consequences due to the high levels of unemployment.

news.headline: LENSAR to release Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on Feb 27, with conference call at 8:30am ET.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, LENSAR, Inc. (Nasdaq: LNSR), a worldwide medical technology firm specializing in robotic laser treatments for cataracts, revealed that their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 will be disclosed before the market opens on Thursday, February 27, 2025. A conference call and webcast will be conducted by LENSAR’s management at 8:30 am ET on the same day to review the financial outcomes and recent company updates.

news.headline: CurlyCon LA returns to celebrate natural texture diversity in Downtown LA, aiming to empower women with hair education.
news.summary: Los Angeles will host the second edition of CurlyCon LA after its successful launch in 2023. The event, founded by Ava Pearl, aims to bring together women of diverse hair textures and cultural backgrounds. CurlyCon LA serves as a platform for brands to showcase their new products, featuring panels focused on educating about various hair types. The event promotes inclusivity and community building.

Pampa Metals to acquire Rugby Resources, pursuing ASX listing, becoming leading S. American porphyry copper explorer acquires 100% of Rugby's shares.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in Vancouver, British Columbia, Pampa Metals Corp. ("Pampa Metals") and Rugby Resources Ltd. ("Rugby") announced a significant development. Pampa Metals, listed as CSE:PM, FSE:FIR, OTCQB:PMMCF, has signed a binding letter agreement with Rugby, listed as TSXV:RUG, outlining the acquisition of 100% of Rugby's shares. This transaction marks a strategic move for both companies and is set to have a substantial impact on their operations and growth in the foreseeable future.

news.headline: BTC hits $93.5k then rebounds, Google eyes BTC ease. Strategy raises $2bn, FTX pays $800m. Tether mints $1bn, buys stake in agri giant.       Pro-crypto Lutnick as commerce sec. LIBRA scam tied to Milei’s sister. SEC mulls XRP ETF. Tether co-founder works on stablecoin, Gold tokenized in HK. Schwab appoints digital assets head, Wintermute expands in US, Bullish secures HK license.
news.summary: Bitcoin reached a high of $93.5k before experiencing a rebound, leading to an increase in alternative cryptocurrencies. Google is considering ways to streamline the adoption of Bitcoin. A strategy is being implemented to raise an additional $2 billion for the purchase of Bitcoin. FTX has already distributed $800 million to 160,000 individuals. Tether has minted an additional $1 billion USDT on the Tron network and is in the process of acquiring a majority stake in an agricultural company. A supporter of cryptocurrency, Lutnick, is set to become the commerce secretary. The fraudulent scheme involving LIBRA is linked to Milei’s sibling. The SEC has officially recognized an XRP ETF. A co-founder of Tether is developing a stablecoin that generates yields. Hong Kong is exploring tokenizing gold. Schwab has appointed a head of digital assets. Wintermute is planning an expansion into the United States. Bullish has acquired a license in Hong Kong.

news.headline: Trump's tariff plan hampers stock market rally; Gold outperforms bitcoin in 2025 by 13.92%, surprising crypto bulls.
news.summary: Gold has outperformed bitcoin in 2025 by 13.92%, with gold demonstrating lower volatility compared to the highly volatile bitcoin. Despite the belief of smart crypto bulls that influential figures in the U.S. were positioned for crypto profits, recent trends show foreign central banks and smart money globally are buying gold. This shift has led to gold outperforming bitcoin, contrary to the expectations of crypto supporters pushing for a U.S. strategic bitcoin reserve. The news indicates a turn in investment trends towards gold over bitcoin, surprising those who had dismissed gold as useless in comparison to cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: NFL legends and advocates from 49 states participate in 14th Annual Rare Disease Week on Capitol Hill, meeting with over 300 member offices.
news.summary: In Washington, on February 19, 2025, the EveryLife Foundation for Rare Diseases announced that advocates from 49 states and Puerto Rico will participate in Rare Disease Week on Capitol Hill. The event will see representatives from the rare disease community visiting more than 300 member offices during the week of February 24. This gathering aims to raise awareness and advocate for the needs of individuals with rare diseases.

news.headline: Hyatt Regency debuts in Central America with Panama City opening, 1st in region. Grupo Desarrollo Bahia key player.
news.summary: Hyatt Hotels Corporation (NYSE:H) and Grupo Desarrollo Bahia have revealed the launch of Hyatt Regency Panama City, marking the debut of the first Hyatt Regency hotel in Central America. Situated in the heart of the city's financial hub, the hotel is designed to cater to the needs of business travelers, as well as provide a comfortable base for those keen on delving into Panama's cultural heritage. Backed by Grupo Desarrollo Bahía's four decades of expertise in real estate development, the project underscores the company's significant contribution towards shaping Panama's urban landscape.

Global dental resin market valued at USD 1.4 billion in 2023, projected to reach USD 2.5 billion by 2034 with 5.9% CAGR.
news.summary: The global dental resin industry was valued at US$1.4 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 5.9% from 2024 to 2034, reaching US$2.5 billion by 2034. The market is driven by advancements in dental materials, increasing demand for cosmetic dentistry, and the rising prevalence of dental disorders. Dental resins provide longevity and strength to the jaw while maintaining the original tooth placement. Nanotechnology is also contributing to advancements in esthetic dental resin applications. The market includes synthetic polymer-based materials used in restorative and prosthetic dentistry such as fillings, dentures, and 3D-printed dental solutions. Major players in the market include 3M Company, Dentsply Sirona, Ivoclar Vivadent AG, GC Corporation, and others. Key market developments include increased investment in R&D for next-generation dental resins, expansion strategies in emerging markets, and regulatory compliance with FDA and other authorities. Market growth is fueled by increasing demand for dental restorations, advancements in materials, and the rising adoption of digital dentistry.

news.headline: Arista shares fall due to concerns over losing Meta Platforms as top customer, impacting revenue guidance for 2025.
news.summary: Arista stock's anticipated revenue for the entire year of 2025 fell short of expectations, leading to concerns among Wall Street analysts who are reassessing the significance of AI-driven data center enhancements. These developments have exerted pressure on Arista stock due to fears surrounding potential loss of shares from its primary client, Meta Platforms.

news.headline: US Treasury secretary to boycott G20 Finance Ministers Meeting in South Africa, second official to skip amid tensions over land policies.
news.summary: The United States Treasury Secretary has become the second most important American government official to refuse attendance at the Group of 20 meetings. This decision comes amidst increasing strain in relations with South Africa regarding its land policies.
